summary: Added a suspicious-crop review-pack generator and CLI command backed by output-integrity suspicious rendered-crop candidates.

files_changed.why: Added create_suspicious_crop_review_pack and gallery metadata for suspicious crop dimensions.
Exposed suspicious-crop-review-pack as a CLI command.
Added regression coverage for review-pack creation from valid suspicious PNG dimensions.
Added CLI surface assertions for the new command and options.

test_results: Initial targeted run failed as expected because create_suspicious_crop_review_pack was missing.
Full test_runtime_paths remains blocked by an unrelated missing archive/topic_pdfs_legacy fixture assertion.
Live review-pack command succeeded and sampled the top 10 of 31 suspicious crop candidates.
deviations_from_plan: Used a narrowed runtime-path test because the full file has an unrelated archive fixture failure.
repo_hygiene_notes: No canonical output images or question_bank.json were rewritten.
The live review pack was written under this run's iteration folder.
known_risks: The review pack links to existing images; it does not copy immutable snapshots of those images.
It can include the same question_id more than once when both question and mark-scheme crops are suspicious.
